tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua(19,3): error TLUA2322: Type 'boolean, boolean' is not assignable to type '(nil) | (number, string)'.
  Type 'boolean, boolean' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
    Type at position 1 in source is not compatible with type at position 1 in target.
      Type 'boolean' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua(43,43): error TLUA1385: Function type notation must be parenthesized when used in a union type.
tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua(43,45): error TLUA7051: Parameter has a name but no type. Did you mean 'arg0: number'?
tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua(43,53): error TLUA7051: Parameter has a name but no type. Did you mean 'arg1: string'?
tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua(43,60): error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.


==== tluaReturnPackUnionMixed.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // A return-type union may mix a pack arm with a NON-pack (scalar) arm. The scalar arm
    // reads as a one-value pack, so an IMPLEMENTATION may return it directly.
    local function impl(): (number, string) | nil
      return nil
    end
    local function impl2(): (number, string) | nil
      return 1, "x"
    end
    
    // Forwarding a same-typed mixed union through `return f()` must be accepted: the
    // source union's `nil` arm is lifted to match the target's, exactly as a bare
    // `return nil` is. (A mismatched forward is still rejected -- see badFwd below.)
    declare function maybe(): (number, string) | nil
    local function forward(): (number, string) | nil
      return maybe()
    end
    declare function other(): (boolean, boolean)
    local function badFwd(): (number, string) | nil
      return other()
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'boolean, boolean' is not assignable to type '(nil) | (number, string)'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'boolean, boolean' is not assignable to type 'number, string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:     Type at position 1 in source is not compatible with type at position 1 in target.
!!! error TLUA2322:       Type 'boolean' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    end
    
    // Direct-call correlated narrowing on a mixed union -- consistent with the
    // expression-list path: checking one name narrows the other. The `nil` arm lifts to a
    // one-value pack so the value list is a union of packs the narrowing can discriminate.
    declare function maybe(): (number, string) | nil
    local value, err = maybe();
    local valueFlat: number | nil = value;
    local errFlat: string | nil = err;
    if err ~= nil then
      local eStr: string = err;
      local vNum: number = value;
    end
    
    // The same mixed union spliced as a non-leading value in an expression list narrows
    // identically (no divergence between the two value-list paths).
    local lead, value2, err2 = 1, maybe();
    if err2 ~= nil then
      local vNum2: number = value2;
    end
    
    // The pack grammar is scoped to the outermost return union: it must NOT be recognized
    // inside a type predicate's asserted type, where a pack is a parenthesization error.
    declare function guard(x: any): x is nil | (number, string);
                                              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1385: Function type notation must be parenthesized when used in a union type.
                                                ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7051: Parameter has a name but no type. Did you mean 'arg0: number'?
                                                        ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA7051: Parameter has a name but no type. Did you mean 'arg1: string'?
                                                               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '=>' expected.
